notes: The disc has NO efct.txg. The real particle-image container is ptcl00.txg ('particle image container'), an 8-entry GameCube texture group (offset table at 0x0, each entry a 32-byte header: imageCount, GXTexFmt, unk, width, height, unk, dataOffset, paletteWord). All ptcl00 entries are non-paletted (I4 / I8 / RGB565) soft particle billboards. RGB565 sprites have no alpha and are meant for additive blending (black = transparent); I4/I8 sprites are intensity masks used as the alpha channel. efct00.tpl is one RGB5A3 atlas of soft blob/ring puffs (has real alpha). efct.pzz, efct00_mdl.arc, efct01_mdl.arc are the effect billboard MESHES that reference these textures (the .arc HSD models contain no embedded textures; efct.pzz is PZZ-compressed and not unpacked by current tooling).

images.guessLabel: spark / wispy star burst (white, intensity mask)
flame / explosion core (orange-red, yellow hot center)
hit spark / ember (small bright orange dot)
soft glow falloff gradient (white, intensity mask)
soft round smoke/dust puff (white, intensity mask)
effect atlas: soft blob/ring/explosion-puff sprites of varying sizes (has alpha)
